title: Illumina COVIDSeq Test: Synthesize First Strand cDNA
author: Opentrons

steps.title: Explanation of complex parameters below
steps.instruction: Explanation of complex parameters below: * `P20 Multichannel GEN2 Pipette Mount`: Choose the mount position of your P20 Multichannel pipette, either left or right. * `Reservoir Labware Type`: Choose the type of reservoir that will be used for holding the master mix. **Note: Only the Bio-Rad Hard-Shell 96 Well Plate 200 µL plate will resume after Plate 1 and prompt for a refill of the master mix.** * `Plate 1 Columns`: Choose which columns master mix should be added on plate

steps.title: Separate column numbers with a comman (Ex
steps.instruction: Separate column numbers with a comman (Ex: 1,2,3,4). * `Plate 2 Columns`: Choose which columns master mix should be added on plate

steps.title: Separate column numbers with a comman (Ex
steps.instruction: Separate column numbers with a comman (Ex: 1,2,3,4). * `Temperature (C)`: Choose the temperature the temperature module should be set at in the beginning of the protocol. ---

steps.title: Pick up tips from Opentrons 96...
steps.instruction: Pick up tips from Opentrons 96 Filter Tip Rack 20 µL on Slot 10

steps.title: Aspirate 8
steps.instruction: Aspirate 8.0 uL from Column 1 (A1) of Master Mix Reservoir

steps.title: Dispense 8
steps.instruction: Dispense 8.0 uL into Column 1 (A1) of Plate 1 on Slot 11

steps.title: Drop tips into Opentrons Fixed Trash Bin
steps.instruction: Drop tips into Opentrons Fixed Trash Bin

steps.title: Pick up tips from Opentrons 96...
steps.instruction: Pick up tips from Opentrons 96 Filter Tip Rack 20 µL on Slot 7

steps.title: Aspirate 8
steps.instruction: Aspirate 8.0 uL from Column 1 (A1) of Master Mix Reservoir

steps.title: Dispense 8
steps.instruction: Dispense 8.0 uL into Column 1 (A1) of Plate 2 on Slot 11

steps.title: Drop tips into Opentrons Fixed Trash Bin
steps.instruction: Drop tips into Opentrons Fixed Trash Bin
